reasons: Tigreal can start fights and group enemies so Yi Sun-shin can follow with damage and global pressure.
Yi Sun-shin's map vision helps the team choose better timing before Tigreal commits.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the engage, while Yi Sun-shin follows with damage and map-pressure support.
worksBestWhen: Yi Sun-shin has position to follow up before Tigreal fully commits.
Tigreal engages after the team has enough vision or objective pressure.
failureCases: Tigreal engages while Yi Sun-shin is split too far from the fight.
Yi Sun-shin is forced to disengage before dealing follow-up damage.

reasons: Atlas can drag enemies together, giving Yi Sun-shin a clearer teamfight damage window.
Yi Sun-shin can use global vision to support engage timing before Atlas starts.

proof.summary: Atlas groups enemies, while Yi Sun-shin follows with ranged pressure and objective-side damage.
worksBestWhen: Yi Sun-shin is already near enough to attack after the drag.
Atlas engages after the target positions are known.
failureCases: Atlas engages while Yi Sun-shin is farming or too far from the fight.
Enemies disengage before Yi Sun-shin can follow.

reasons: Mathilda helps Yi Sun-shin reposition between ranged damage, melee follow-up, and objective fights.
Shield support makes him safer when he steps forward to finish targets.

proof.summary: Mathilda improves Yi Sun-shin's fight positioning and gives him a safer route during skirmishes.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda supports Yi Sun-shin around objectives or river fights.
Yi Sun-shin uses the route to maintain damage uptime or disengage.
failureCases: Yi Sun-shin overcommits into melee range without an escape route.
Mathilda is too far away to provide a useful path.

reasons: Angela can protect Yi Sun-shin when he plays aggressively around objectives or cleanup.
This improves his ability to keep dealing damage after being targeted.

proof.summary: Angela adds a shield and support layer so Yi Sun-shin can keep pressure during fights.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches during an objective fight or cleanup chase.
Yi Sun-shin has room to continue attacking after the shield arrives.
failureCases: Yi Sun-shin is caught before Angela can channel Heartguard.
The enemy disengages until the protection window ends.

reasons: Yi Sun-shin's global reveal can help locate enemies before Franco looks for a hook.
Franco's hook or suppression can create a single-target pick that Yi Sun-shin can help finish.

proof.summary: Yi Sun-shin gives map information, and Franco converts that information into hook or suppression pickoffs.
worksBestWhen: Franco uses the reveal window to predict enemy movement through river or jungle.
Yi Sun-shin is close enough to help finish the target.
failureCases: Franco catches a durable frontline target.
